<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/collection library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Collection\Exception; use RuntimeException; /** * Thrown when attempting to access an element that does not exist. */ class NoSuchElementException extends RuntimeException implements CollectionException { }
